title: Platform Layer — Auth APIs, Onboarding, Org Management
UPDATE_STATUS: Set T-D2-001 status=in_progress in WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json first

MANDATORY_QC_FIXES.sql: ALTER TABLE organisations ADD COLUMN onboarding_step INT DEFAULT 0; ADD COLUMN onboarding_completed BOOLEAN DEFAULT false; ADD COLUMN onboarding_skipped_ai BOOLEAN DEFAULT false; ADD COLUMN timezone VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'Asia/Kolkata'; ADD COLUMN financial_year_start VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'April';

MANDATORY_QC_FIXES.task: Create apps/web/lib/auth/with-auth.ts — shared withAuth() wrapper for API routes
MANDATORY_QC_FIXES.signature: export function withAuth(handler, options?: { roles?: Role[] }): NextRequest => Promise<NextResponse>
MANDATORY_QC_FIXES.behavior: Extracts JWT from cookie, verifies, injects user context, optionally checks role, returns 401/403 if fails

API_ROUTES_TO_BUILD.desc: Create org + admin user, set JWT cookie, return org_id
Invite user by email, create pending user record
Get AI token usage for current org this month

PATTERNS.all_routes: Use withAuth() wrapper for all protected routes
PATTERNS.org_isolation: All DB queries must filter by org_id from JWT — NEVER trust request body org_id

ON_COMPLETE: Set T-D2-001 status=completed in WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json. STOP — VEDABOSS will assign T-M4 QC.
TOKEN_LIMIT: If context < 20%: save partial work, POST to VEDABOSS/TOKEN_LIMITS.json {engine:CODEX, task_id:T-D2-001, progress, files_saved, reset_at, resume_from}
